name: SA Sample - API Endpoint
brief: Sample: REST API endpoint exposing a Business Central AI agent to Power Automate and external callers.
description: Exposes an /askAgent endpoint via a PageType = API page. External callers — Power Automate flows, custom apps, integration platforms — POST a prompt and receive the Smart Agent's response. The recommended pattern for letting non-AL clients talk to D365 BC AI agents, with audit logging and BC's standard OAuth authentication.
